description: agent-pipeline sandbox (design doc §16 'Permissions and sandboxing') and best-effort per-session budget enforcement (design doc §10 'Resource budgets'): no agent pushes to the default branch; only the submitter pushes a branch, force-pushes, or creates a PR; writes are confined to the pipeline's worktree/state-dir slice; network egress outside an allow-list is routed to the human instead of run autonomously; a session whose own transcript usage crosses the configured token budget is blocked from further tool calls.
